title: phaseolus vulgaris var. tricolor
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. tricolor, also known as the Rainbow Bean or Tricolor Bean, is a variety of the common bean plant. It is a legume that contains high amounts of anthocyanins, which are responsible for its vibrant color and have been found to have medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. tricolor include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as improving digestion and reducing oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to support overall health and well-being.
